This is a Next.js 15 project with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, ESLint, and App Router, bootstrapped with `create-next-app`.

## Stack
- Next.js 15 (App Router)
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- ESLint

## Project Structure
- `src/app/` — App Router pages and layouts
- `public/` — Static assets

## Commands
- `npm run dev` — Start development server
- `npm run build` — Build for production
- `npm run lint` — Run ESLint
